name: vortos/vortos-ops-kit
description: Vortos Ops Kit — the one uniform swappable-driver pattern (port + named drivers + DI-keyed registry + capability descriptor + conformance TCK + agnosticism lint + make:driver scaffolder). Shared primitives every deploy/ops concern reuses. Zero runtime reflection.

suggest.nikic/php-parser: Required for the AST-based agnosticism lint (AgnosticismScanner / PHPStan rule)
suggest.phpstan/phpstan: Required to wire AgnosticismRule as a first-class PHPStan rule
